[Intractible neurobehavior abnormopathy treated during chemotherapy; evaluation with clinical features]
Neurobehavioral abnormalities due to intractible neuropsychologic symptoms and mental retardation after chemotherapy in pediatric cancer survivors were reviewed. In addition, clinical features of neurobehavioral abnormalities were investigated, which were related to developmental quotients. Ten cases of children with mental retardation and intractible neuropsychologic symptoms due to neuropsychological dysfunction during chemotherapy, for whom clinical features (n = 5) were evaluated were reviewed. Neurologic examination, neuropsychological evaluation, and MRI findings are discussed with clinical features of intractible neuropsychological symptoms. Two important points which were pointed out in the literature are discussed. First, when we investigate the cause of intractible neuropsychological problem in pediatric cancers survivors after chemotherapy, clinical features should also be investigated. Second, in the evaluation and treatment of intractible neuropsychological problem in pediatric cancer survivors after chemotherapy, development quotients should be investigated, and it is possible to use them as an indicator of the efficacy for recovery.

Many agents, including myself, do not begin working with each real estate transaction until five days or later.

For several reasons:

After five years most agents will have made enough money to earn enough to retire, and can afford to do without the "bureaucratic hassles" of being an agent.

There is also a very real danger that agents who have been in business a long time, and especially those who have the name recognition, will become so familiar with the problems of their clients, that they can only do so much to help them.

Finally, there is a tendency for long-term agents to become more familiar with their clients, and to be so preoccupied with handling their problems that new problems fall by the wayside.

A man wanted in Arizona following allegations regarding criminal offenses will plead guilt if presented by New Yorkers.



According to reports, James Bielawa, the New York resident accused of the crimes, will be charged with one hate crime and one other felony in the state. That other felony is a Class A misdemeanor.



The New York State Hate Crimes Unit reported the crime on Thursday. However, Bielawa's case is not related to a recent attack in Arizona that left seven people dead.



As the New York State Hate Crimes Unit details, on September 19, 2018, Bielawa, who is in his twenties, allegedly shouted racial slurs at a group of pedestrians and used his cell phone to snap photos and videos of the victims. During this incident, he approached and began speaking to several people who were standing at a traffic light when he allegedly threw a rock through the car window of one of the people who were standing there. He then threw another rock at a person on the sidewalk.



Bielawa was issued a summons for the offense during 2017 after he was arrested for an incident involving a different group of pedestrians.



He was released from criminal court after posting bail in the case, according to reports.

for high-risk patients. The overall purpose of this review is to describe the
mechanisms involved in tumour progression at various stages of HIV and
tumour relationship to the immune system. We also discuss the relationship of
immune system and tumour growth. The various immune responses that are
involved in tumour progression are discussed in the last section. There is not only
the cellular immune response associated with the development of anti-tumour
immune responses. The humoral immune responses are also found in the tumour
tissue and are thought to contribute to tumour progression at different tumour
stages. In addition, interactions between tumour cells and leukocytes is
important in tumour progress. The role of the various immune cells in anti-tumour
immune responses and their interaction with tumour cells is discussed.

Boris Mäkin. Soteria, pisana - is an album by the Finnish folk singer, composer and producer Boris Mäkin.

Boris Mäkin. Soteria, pisana is an album by the Finnish folk singer and composer Boris Mäkin. It was released on 4 August 2018, in the album of the same name. This is Boris's second studio album.

Background and release 

The second studio album  was released on 4 August 2018, in the album of the same name on EMI. The release takes place in the second half of the summer and is intended to be released "early next year". Boris explained his decision to start working on a new album, explaining that he wished to "express more". However, he has also stated that he is not working on a new project as yet, only a new song. To promote the album, Boris released 3 single songs - including the album's title track.

We describe a case of fungiform hemianonevrosis that was associated with an infection by Cogan's syndrome, an infection by the subcutaneous spread of Pseudomonas aeruginosa. The patient was a 72-year-old male who received outpatient treatment for chronic herpes simplex type 1. Two weeks before developing fungiform hemianonevrosis, the patient had contracted a chronic blistering disease of the left lower lip that had not been previously noticed. At that time, the lesion had been treated with oral itraconazole, but a lesion on the left forehead had occurred, which had not been treated. A month before the patient was referred to our outpatient clinic, a lesion was seen in the left forehead. Fungiform hemianonevrosis developed 6 months after the appearance of the forehead lesion and was treated with excision, topical metronidazole, and oral itraconazole. A.S. is a social research project at the Faculty of Health Sciences, Bielefeld University. It focuses on the complex phenomenon of socialisation which is at the centre of the analysis of the process of integrating youth in the labour market as a result of internationalisation. A.S. is organised into interdisciplinary research themes and is integrated in the fields of labour market dynamics, social integration of the globalised labour market and intercultural education.

Policrór Istva na Bavel is a railway station located in Tórshavn, a borough of Tórshavn Harbour, on Tórshavn. The station opened on 1 May 1885. In April 2015, the railway line was closed.

GitLab-SUSE, the company building a new service to help build secure software using collaboration in the Git community, today announced the opening of its Dev Cloud, a cloud computing service designed specifically to help large groups build and integrate distributed open source software.

The move is made possible by the investment from SUSE and the support of UK-based hosting services that makes it possible for hundreds of users to get access to a large server without going through the usual corporate IT processes.

Since opening the Dev Cloud in November 2013 the company has added support for Linux and Git (the platform is also currently looking at extending it to other platforms).

"Since the early days of GitHub, Linux and Git (or any of the other great open source collaboration tools) have been the basis for creating and scaling companies and teams,” said Matt Carvalho, CEO of SUSE. "GitLab-SUSE’s commitment to creating a new open-source model of using and supporting Git is an important step forward in creating more open software solutions."

GitHub users can now access the Dev Cloud through a GitLab installation

The effect a change to school policy affects school mental functioning: research in elementary and grade school health.
The purpose of this article is to examine the effect a change in school policy has on students' and teachers' mental functioning and self-concept. A national sample of 489 elementary and grade school teachers completed measures of students' and teachers' perceptions of their school environment and mental functioning and a measure of students' self-concept. Teachers indicated their attitudes toward the school policy change that occurred after the policy change, and their reasons for supporting or opposing the school policy change. The relationship between attitude toward policy change and students' and teachers' perceptions of school environment and mental functioning was tested. Attitudes and reasons for supporting an intervention were the most significant predictors of teachers' self-reports of students' and teachers' perceptions of the school environment and students' and teachers' mental development. Students' self-concept was most positively influenced by teachers' attitudes regarding their own mental functioning. Teachers who strongly supported the school policy change had higher self-esteem and were more likely to report that their students were well functioning, were cooperative, and had less difficulty in completing schoolwork. Teachers who strongly opposed the school policy change reported a lower level of self-esteem and were more likely

A:

You should have written "correlation", and this is not a linear correlation you are looking for. The usual definition of Correlation implies that the two variables are positively correlated. With the usual definition of  $n$  variables (a positive sum of all pairwise correlations) and $n$ responses, the correlation is just $1$ minus the variance.
If you think of it in terms of a linear regression  with one predictor (your QRS complex), the formula would be simply $-S^2X(\hat \beta_1 - \hat \beta_0)$, which is not $n$ and $n-1$. So the variance will not be a linear function of QRS Complex (nor QRS Complex Variance)

The Funny (Cyrano, quipu, etc) is the Spanish word for quipu, which is a device that a person can put on the hand and arm, allowing it to perform many tricks, the most important being the ability to make sounds. The device is made of wood or metal, is very heavy and has a large knurled knob at the end of one side where it comes to a point.  The quipu (pronounced “pee-pee”) is a traditional Spanish item that is seen all over Hispanic America and is believed to have originated in northern South America. It was first used by Zapotecs, and they are often depicted holding one. There are as many designs as designs of quipus.

In modern times, the quipu is commonly used both in the traditional and artistic sense. It is usually held by hand, while the fingers are placed either on top of one another or side by side. The object is then closed in such a way so that only one edge is uncovered. Other ways of holding the item include using the palm or the back of hand as well as the finger tips.

Kermaenet and Blye to start second-stage of the world heritage drive

As a result of the ongoing campaign, all the sites from the drive in Europe that should make it to UNESCO's list have been granted World Heritage status. This is an important sign that efforts are starting to turn that corner. Now the Kermaenet and Blye sites have gone online, and now they can be celebrated too!

Two major sites have finally made it onto the website. Kermaenet (Danish: "Hole"), an Iron Age fortified settlement on the north coast of Jutland, was an important trading port and has been classified as a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1995. The other site is the World Heritage Site of Blye (Danish: "Bølle"). Blye is a Bronze Age fortified settlement where several monuments are built and where there was a large shipyard, a castle and other structures.

The inactivating compounds 5 and 5a inactivate porphobilinogen oxidase with inhibition constants for PBOH of 2.5 x 10(-2) and 3.2 x 10(-3) M, respectively. Inactivation of the enzyme may occur by formation of a Schiff base between the enzyme and the inactivating 5 and 5a. "And I think it really is going to be a breakthrough because it's really going to open the door for more female role models. They're going to open the door for more girls to be able to choose what subject they're going to study in college."

"We saw a lot of girls just coming out with cameras, getting pictures of us in the audience and then talking to the ladies on stage and sharing their stories and learning their stories," Pinchot adds. With development of Ethernet technology and development of IEEE 1394 standard, the home network is becoming ubiquitous. In many home networks, a plurality of personal computers (PCs) and other devices can share one network cable. Such network cable is in many aspects the same as the traditional wired Ethernet cable used for data transmission in the local area network (LAN).
However, the IEEE 1394 standard is the communication standard used to transmit large file data across network cable. The IEEE 1394 standard has the following features: 1) Transmission of data frame is in 10-bit units. The physical layer transmits a data frame with 16-byte size, 8-bit time to transmit, and 8-bit unit to receive; 2) Data frame contains two types of frames: control frames with data field and data frames with a “data_id” field. An experimental test with Lomustice (Buchardella longolovi)(a novel and potent antibiotic) in rats.
The activity of Lomustice (Buchardella longolovi) was studied on 7-day-old rats. The rats were inoculated intraperitoneally with 1-10 X 10(6) CFUs and Lomustice was administered orally for 21 days and then for another 21 days. An acute toxicity test was conducted. The growth rate of Lomustice was found to be higher than those of streptomycin and rifampicin. In comparison with the two drugs, Lomustice had the best effect on the survival of experimental animals. In the experiment which investigated the effect on the growth of E. faecalis and P. mirabilis, the results revealed that Lomustice had stronger antibacterial activity than that of three drugs against both pathogens and that its activity was stronger against E. faecalis than against P. mirabilis. No adverse side-effects were recognized in the experiment. However, in the experiment using mice, Lomustice was found to increase the weight of the inoculated mice in a dose-dependent manner. In situ visualization revealed by Ramana, with video

January 1 2019 1030GMT

A two-stage Raman shift with video has been reported by researchers. Ramana is a technique that can distinguish in the near-infrared a chemical structure by measuring the ratio of the optical path lengths (OL) for two types of molecules and then plotting the optical path lengths (OPL) versus wavelength.

For their first method of imaging, they chose two molecules whose OPLs would be approximately the same at the near-infrared and compared them with different types of molecules. In theory, if the OPL of one type of molecule were twice that of another, an equal or smaller fraction of the light would pass through it.

They discovered that two molecules, which had the same OL, showed identical OPLs.

They then investigated other two types of chemicals and found that they too had two-channel Raman spectra — meaning that each had a pair of molecules with two pairs of symmetrical lines in the same ratio.

Next, they combined the previous two types to create a single molecule that had both symmetrical OPL lines and two identical OPLs at one wavelength.

The geology of the lower basin is characterised by two major geologic units: the Plinian, a band of igneous rock, and the Precambrian, which consists of metamorphic rock.

The Plinian unit consists of several layers of intrusive rocks from the Carboniferous to Miocene. The most recent are Jurassic and Cretaceous rocks, the last of which is the top part of the unit. The Precambrian rock that is underlie the river basin is metamorphosed and contains the Jurassic, Cretaceous and Tertiary formations. The Tertiary sedimentary unit is composed of the Silurian, Devonian, Pennsylvanian, Permian, Palaeozoic, Neoproterozoic and Permian formations.

The lithology of the bedrock is dominated by sandstones and mudstones. The sandstone material covers most of the basin, and is characterised by its homogeneity, whereas the mudstones are mainly found in the floodplain area. The rock is very heterogeneous, with sandstones interbedded with claystones.

DIN has produced a series of documents aimed at simplifying the interpretation and validation of the results from clinical studies regarding treatments for health, especially with regard to their efficacy and safety. These documents have been drawn up over the past 20-30 years. As a result, a number of issues with regard to their use have arisen that require further study and discussion that, for some, may not be so easy or straightforward to identify. Inevitably, this applies equally and in a similar way to the application of the guidelines produced by this type of document. In general, this type of guidelines document is aimed mainly at healthcare professionals or other experts in the relevant health-care disciplines. If they are to be used in the decision-making stage of clinical studies concerning treatments for health, this often limits their usefulness. As the result, the clinical validity of these types of guidelines will be more a matter of interpretation than of fact. This is not always the case. The symptoms of neurodegeneration may consist in a subjective loss of senses and sometimes in a physical disability. The most serious problem is the increase in mortality and the increase in the duration of suffering and disability among aged people. Therefore, the neurodegeneration is a global health problem. For the treatment of these diseases, the treatment of the underlying disease is the most important issue. For the treatment of neurodegenerative diseases, the use of a neuroprotective drug is the most significant factor. However, not always the neuroprotective drugs work well and the long run use of the same drug may have side effects. Hexadecosidases I in Candida dubliaeliformis from human sources.
Hexadecosidase I from Candida dublieliformis was assayed in a crude enzyme preparation isolated from blood plasma of healthy adult volunteers. The enzyme activity was compared to the activity found in a crude cell suspension of C. dublieliformis, obtained by a centrifugal elutriation technique. A significant difference was observed between the two preparations, showing an approximately 20% less activity of the crude cell suspension against the soluble substrate benzyl glucoside. The activity of the active purified hexadecosidase has been studied with respect to pH, temperature and inhibition by compounds of possible therapeutic interest. The enzyme is inhibited strongly by the sulfanilamide derivative p-chlorobenzenesulfonitril (p-CBO). The inhibition is uncompetitive and reversible and is characterized by Ki values of 0.04 and 0.2 mM for p-CBO, respectively. The enzyme is inhibited by other sulfonamides, ketones, amino acids and thiol groups with a KI greater than 500 mM. Amino acids and ketones, but not the sulfonamides above mentioned, exhibit significant activity

Recently, the financial world has seen cases where financial data has been used for illegal or illicit purposes. Many institutions have suffered losses by accepting incorrect information, resulting in losses for users of the financial data.
One type of problem involves the illegal use of credit cards, debit cards and debit-credit cards. For example, an individual can use his or her credit card to order merchandise from a website. Often, the credit card is used to purchase the merchandise under false pretenses, possibly resulting in the purchase of low quality merchandise or no merchandise at all.
Credit and debit card information are also often abused by websites for fraudulent transactions. This happens when the individual who buys the merchandise is not the same person who ordered the merchandise via the credit card. Such websites have typically used a form of a “phishing” attack that simulates the credit card number that is usually on a piece of paper on which the credit card number is usually printed for use. Bacteriacomycotomi of phanaeocotic plants associated microorganisms may influence quality and shelf life of the products.
Antimicrobial food products are of growing importance in recent years and the presence and/or development of antibacterial activity during storage of products has been the subject of many studies. Amongst bacterial species isolated from foods it is commonly observed that the species of Enterobacteriaceae are more prominent in these products when compared to non-food related samples. Bacteriacomycotomi (Bac.) are micro-organisms that frequently play a role in the development of antimicrobial food products. This review aims to present a summary and summarize results concerning the micro-organisms that play a role in the development of food safety and food quality and how these microorganisms interact and influence the development of antimicrobial products.

Q-GTP hydroquinonedipezam (Gentian: qijian yu xiao; Chinese: 刀兔的酒; pinyin Qiang Guo Lòng) is a classic Chinese beverage composed of a mixture of honey, sugar, and milk. There are variants made with different combinations of ingredients such as water and red dates as well as different concentrations of different ingredients.

In addition to being served as a drink, it also functions as a sweetener in Chinese cuisine as its sugar content makes it easily digestible. It has a high nutritive value of about 7.9 g of sugar per 100 g serving, as of 2010; it is the most widely adopted sweetener by Taiwanese and Chinese cuisine, ranking ninth in the amount of sugar in Taiwan, and the fourth most common by volume among all food additives in China (2010).[2][3]

Etymology

This application relies against recent progress made by our team as a step away (again) form a more generic approach to improve our ability to assess individual response to cancer treatment based upon the tumor mutational profile. The application includes the development of a comprehensive algorithm to assess response to cancer treatment, which is based upon the cancer mutational profile and which incorporates: 1) the impact of mutations on the protein product, 2) the interaction between these mutations and their impact upon protein function, and 3) the distribution of mutations in all cancers in order to distinguish a response profile from a normal and/or treatment-induced profile. We have chosen 5 of 10 genes which when mutated are associated with treatment-induced tumors (ATM, BRAF, EGFR, TP53, RB, PIK3CA) and have shown that the cancer mutational profile is highly predictive of response to treatment in that it can identify: 1) a subset of patients who, despite apparently negative response to therapy, do in fact respond, 2) a subset of patients who, despite apparent resistance, show a response to treatment, and 3) a subset of patients who, despite apparent resistance, do not respond to treatment. A total of 523 youth aged between 11 and 17 years completed a self-report survey of media use, sleep quality and health.

Nasik Road Tunnel Project :
Government of Himachalis & Darruma district have signed MOU for the execution of the Nasik Road Tunnel Project. As part of this project the MOU provides a framework for construction of six km stretch between NH 44 and NH 1; three km stretch; one km stretch; and two km stretch; connecting two toll plazas in Manmohanpur town; two toll plazas in Narayanpur town and three toll plazas in Nasik town. It shall include the construction of the underpass. The underpass shall include a flyover and be at a height of 60 meters above mean sea level and at the same level as NH 44, the road on the right being the Dharampur–Dharampur Toll Road.

The project is expected to complete in six years and the entire project of six kilometers between NH 44 (Himachal) and NH 1 (Darapur) shall be completed in six years.

How Does the Tunnel Project Affect the Traffic on NH 44?

The Nasik Road Tunnel is the first in India to use flyovers to bypass two junctions, in order to minimise construction and traffic impact.

Llano Grande station - Route 30: An engineering triumph!  LRT and commuter station to be built adjacent to existing one
By Dario Moreno

The next station along Line 30 will be at the site of the old Llano Grande Airport, a former air force base. This station will be one of the newest stations built in the LRT system in the country. The station will be one of two new stations built between downtown and Baja California Sur near the airport. The other new station will be in the industrial district just south of the airport.

This station has been identified as critical to the operation of the LRT system, not only because of its proximity to the airport but because of its close connection to Line 13. As is well known, the LRT system carries riders from Point A to Point B through two main stations and many smaller stops. Many riders make several stops on the LRT to get to various destinations.

Both of the stations will be built next to the existing one, which is a critical point. If the new stations were built, they will form a critical hub to allow for future rapid transit system expansion.

The authors recommend more aggressive therapeutic decisions including aggressive debulks or adjunction therapy but do not consider the use of radiation therapy or systemic treatment for such patients. We found that those patients in poor clinical status and those not offered the recommended treatments received the most severe outcomes. This suggests that aggressive therapeutic decisions (including the use of adjunctive therapy) are not being made without good medical and ethical clinical judgment. Furthermore, the higher rates of complications and death seen in this group suggest that aggressive therapeutic decisions and treatment may not be as well warranted in such patients. A better understanding of the factors determining the choice of treatment may be required to reduce the number of inappropriate treatments used by such patients. In addition, it will be important to better estimate the risk of treatment complications among those patients not offered any form of treatment.

Ngechi Chidobedi’s debut novel, Rabun Chitanda (A Rabun’s Love Story), is a heart-breaking story of a young girl growing into adolescence. Her father and his wife leave her and her mother for a new life in Lagos; she is left to be raised by her grandparents, who were not happy with this arrangement.

Through a series of events and changes, she meets and falls in love with her new neighbours, Mutsa and Mzuri, who are more like her family. They are also not like her family; they are loving and attentive, and they love her wholeheartedly.

At the end of this romantic adventure, she leaves her new life and comes home to find that she has left her family and her love. She decides that she will never be a part of that family again.

L-TyrAICB is found under basal synesthex-like (Syx2) and cell cycle (Cyc) promoter elements within its first intron. The two genes are independently transcribed, but the first intron of L-TyrAICB is transcribed in a complex with Rpb3 and Rpb5, whereas that of Rpb3 is transcribed independently of L-TyrAICB. Toward automated determination-tooth segment numbering for full analysis within electronic patient data.
The number of tooth segments (N) used for the identification of each individual in dental radiography is defined on the basis of the number of segments included in the reference anatomical shape (segment numbering [SN]). To eliminate possible bias and variability due to the number of dento-gingival or vestibular surfaces included in each tooth segment, a new software tool has been designed for dental digital images, based on the analysis of the N of a series of extracted tooth segments. The N of any selected tooth segments could then be automatically calculated. The N values are not affected by the number of teeth included in the segment and, consequently, the SN are independent of the image acquisition and processing parameters. The N values can be used as a reference number for the calculation of age-dependent tooth loss or for the calculation of percentage of tooth loss. Additionally, these numbers also correlate to the number of teeth and, consequently, to the number of available teeth for dental restoration. These new automated tooth segment enumeration methods could be used in oral epidemiology or in dental diagnostic programs.

We propose a multi-level approach to achieve this using an ensemble approach that incorporates the use of a variety of methods to predict potential functional associations (PPFs) and their corresponding known biological pathways (P2K). The multi-level approach is based on a) a large-scale PPI network, b) a large curated protein-protein interaction network (PPI), and c) a variety of omics data sets that have been generated using state-of-art omics technologies.

The methods to predict protein pairs for PPF include different machine learning techniques based on a variety of features of the sequences and structural information and other information on proteins and networks (Figure 1). The prediction methods for potential functional associations are divided into two categories, 1) the sequence-based methods that make use of the machine learning and information extraction techniques to predict if a protein pair has any interaction and 2) structural methods that combine both sequence-based and network-based methods to improve the prediction accuracy.

Bengkowen language-society
Predated on both North Burma () and south Burma (), the "Bengkowen" was spoken by the Bengkowen. It was one in all or parts of North Burma and South Burma; also spoken, at a smaller scale, in the south of Myanmar (Burma) in the Shan States.

It has been reported that only a few hundred people still speak Bengkowen.  It is also reported, however, that it is still spoken by groups of Shan people living in the areas of North and South Burma. There are also reports of it being a minor language in the Shan States.

The development of high yield crops having improved productivity requires increased rates which do no increase yields per acre on dry land fields. For many crop species other methods of reducing yield variation have been sought. Among the various methods that have been used and in addition to chemical insecticides and plant growth regulators, the development or selection of resistant genotypes is an important and promising area of research because it offers the opportunity to reduce yield loss from chemical treatments. However, if insect resistance limits the insecticidal effectiveness of insecticides it can, in turn, reduce the rate of adoption of biotechnology technology for pest management and it has limited the use of herbicides. The increased use of herbicides and insecticides combined with an emphasis on pest management by biological control have led to increased use of other methods of managing insect pests, for example, biological control. A major problem in biological control programmes is the development of resistance to the agents employed. This is because such resistance can reduce efficacy and because some of the agents can be toxic. However, biological control agents can be less susceptible to resistance than insect-vectored insecticides and so the development of resistance is seen as a threat to this important biotechnological tool.

This is interesting for two reasons. First, his work as an advisor may be an important consideration for the World Bank, although his role at the World Bank ended at the time of his departure. Second, his work with the World Bank has been a major focus of most of the three doctoral dissertations that he has published. Given the lack of institutional experience of his first two posts, it would not be surprising if his third work is in the field of development economics and development economics scholarship, but it is possible that a more substantive career may come from his position as an advisor, if he becomes independent of the World Bank.

Mammalian mast cells express three mitogen-activated protein kinase (MAPK) family members, MAP2K, Raf and mitos, all of which are activated by the growth factor known as platelet-derived growth factor (PDGF). The Raf and mitos genes are located on chromosome 8; they have been cloned by homologous screening of a mouse whole-genome DNA library using mouse Raf and mitos cDNA sequences as probes. Sequence analysis of the two genes shows that they are highly homologous but have unique introns. MAPKs are also expressed in sea urchin and in rat and human mast cells, where their activation kinetics and protein tyrosine kinase properties were identical to those of Raf and mitos. Both the mast cell MAPs and the rat MAPKs were activated in a PDGF-like manner and they could also be activated in the presence of a variety of protein tyrosine kinases. Ethereum and Crypto Currencies Review 2018 : In The Long War With Crypto World By John K. Benzing

I’m not going to write everything I want to say about Cryptocurrencies, but let me write about the important thing about a crypto currency such as Ethereum or Bitcoin.

Hair removal methods may present many health benefits: less pain when relaxing the eyes; hair removal may relieve the symptoms of depression; and using light to treat hair loss may reduce the amount of hair in the head. While several options are available to a hair removal enthusiast, these options may involve a significant investment in time, and, most importantly, the hair removal process is traumatic—especially for those with sensitive skin. The skin around hair follicles is delicate and easily irritated, including when the skin is irritated by certain kinds of hair removal solutions (for instance, chemical solutions or electric hair removal, such as the use of clippers, trimmers, or laser devices). Many women even seek laser treatment to eliminate the hair around sensitive skin during periods such as menopause when the skin around the hair follicles becomes sensitive to the sun. Chemical solutions and laser treatments may also damage hair and eyes.
When using a hair removal solution to remove unwanted hair, hair loss may be treated by removing the hair by using chemicals instead of hair removal solution. Using chemicals presents many health risks and can be messy. It can even be dangerous if the chemicals should get caught in or around sensitive areas of the skin, such as around the eyes. Hair removal with chemicals can even cause burns

On a more general level its intention is to:

provide an energy objective consistent with the sustainable development of the atmosphere, oceans and terrestrial ecosystems

ensure energy security and ensure fair, orderly, and orderly financial transactions among all parties

reduce the risk of conflict between countries and groups thereof, and

create a binding, international commitment to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and other sources of global warming.

It also provides for:

an end to deforestation and forest degradation and

protection and preservation of forests in countries, in the global commons, and

protection and preservation of water bodies at global and continental scales from pollution.

Ivan Dinkhurst, 1851 - 1939). Born a German orphan in Galtsbad in Lower Austria in 1768, he left to join the army, where he served with distinction in the Netherlands, Hungary and finally the Polish campaign against Russia. In 1797 he was sent as a military doctor to Russia, and in 1800 he settled in the United States. He became a well-known physician in Brooklyn, New York. But his most noteworthy service to the state was as the surgeon to the 1857 Brooklyn City Hospital. Dinkhurst’s “life in science and art” is described as follows in the New York State Medical Journal: In the “Annual Report of the State Board of Health for 1901-1902,” as stated in this excellent volume, the author says: “Ivan Dinkhurst’s career in medicine was marked by great professional genius, high ideals and rare accomplishments as a clinical investigator and experimental pathologist. Dr. Dinkhurst’s most important research work is the history of diseases of the upper air and the respiratory system. Dr. Dinkhurst discovered many types of lung disease. One of these was what we now call bronchitis, and another was pneumonia.

A comparative microtomodensographical comparison during demasking as well of processing and image interpretation was done between dental computed radiography and digital tomography. The images were analyzed by means of grey and white level analysis and by quantitative image analysis using an image analyzer for microtomographic diagnosis of the jawbones. Three types of processing were applied for the computer derived material: standard thresholding, non-normalization of the contrast, and image processing including different types of edge enhancement. The microtomographical analysis of the grey level values of dental radiographic material showed a similar pattern to that of digital tomopsy images, indicating a high image quality within the dental computed radiography material. However, the dental computed radiographic material was superior with regard to the quantitative digital image analyses, due to the non-normalized contrast, the removal of speckles, and the edge enhancement. In contrast to the digital tomography microtomographical images, grey level analysis and quantitative digital image analyses demonstrated only minor differences within the studied material. With regard to the different types of processing, the non-normalized contrast and the edge enhancement performed best, followed by the standard thresholding and the removal of speckles in the digital tomographical analysis. Soy has two primary forms during cell membrane fusion for protein and gene incorporation: lipid membrane incorporation of membrane-bound proteins, and the addition of nucleic acids. The overall goal of this research is to understand how the interactions between RNA and DNA in vitro, and in mammalian, plant and microbial systems modulate the cellular and molecular biology of gene incorporation. The work will be done under three parallel projects, each aimed at a step in the process of gene synthesis, and focused on the three following questions: 1. Does RNA promote mRNA transcription, or the synthesis of a complementary RNA that acts to activate transcription by binding to a promoter sequence? 2. Does DNA function to enhance mRNA transcription, or the binding by an RNA polymerase to a specific promoter sequence and enhance transcription by a new transcriptionally active RNA polymerase? 3. Does addition of RNA to a promoter sequence, and its subsequent binding to RNA polymerase and other cellular components, or the binding of DNA to membrane-bound proteins, enhance the function of the promoter? Answers to these questions may provide insights into the cellular control of gene synthesis and expression.

the following paper of Michael Aghazian has been circulated as it may be useful in the debate over the value of what
has been called in American English the "new world of work":

The new reality

Michael Aghazian

Work is not just a human construct, but has its roots deep in the natural world that we share with all life. When humans began to do the work involved in feeding the planet, we found a world in which people had to move about and adapt to the conditions they found.

In the industrial era new technologies and techniques were developed by people working in factories. Many of these techniques could only be implemented when it became possible to move about.

The work of these people was a social construction in which we had both a human and a social component that cannot be separated.

A new world of work

A large body of research has shown that work has become more and more routinized and less and less human. The work we do becomes routine, but this doesn't mean that the work itself is less interesting, less worthwhile or less meaningful.

We continue to find that work is a creative and vital activity that cannot be separated from its social,

Mental health status according mental morbid factors based health care seeking behaviors in urban populations of Hong Kong.
This study examined the relationship between two forms of health care-seeking behaviors--a mental and a physical--and perceived mental health problem among adults in Hong Kong. The data came from the Hong Kong Health Barometer. The Hong Kong Hongseongseo Hong Kong Mental Health Study was conducted to help fill the gaps between clinical diagnosis and perception of psychological health problems. This cross-sectional study with a probability sampling method was based on Hong Kong residents. Data were collected in the household interviews. A total of 7,050 people were interviewed. Mental Health and Mental Morbidity (Mental Morbidity Index; MEMI) were assessed by the SF-36. Physical health service seeking for health problems was measured through telephone inquiries from a mental health specialist. A total of 5,025 (77.9 %) respondents had some form of mental illness. An investigation concerning possible interference and misdiagnotation of dental periosi due to the effect of metal-ceramic crown preparations, using cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) and optical inspection.
Recently, the concept of replacing metal crown preparations of veneered ceramic crowns with porcelain veneers has been introduced. However, to date, no evidence concerning the effect of metal-ceramic crown preparations on the quality of intraoral periosi in the human cadaveric periodontal ligament has been available. Therefore, the objective of this study was to explore this problem. Eight human mandibular molars were used as the sample. Eight periosi were prepared with metal-ceramic crown preparations and four with porcelain preparations in a split-mouth manner. After removing the teeth, the periosi were observed using a digital camera. Optical inspection of the samples was then performed using a high-power microscope. The results of the analyses showed no significant difference in terms of quality between the metal-ceramic crown preparations and porcelain preparations (P=0.06). We thus conclude that the quality of periosi in the human cadaveric periodontal ligament can be preserved even in the

Nephotoxicity and renal hemocontent, Na levels,,K levels, calcium (ca) were measured in rats following long term infusion of L-tryptophan. The drug was administered for 28 days (n = 6). Renal Ca and K increased significantly after the drug was initiated with a corresponding decrease in urine volume. Serum Ca was decreased, while urinary Ca and K were increased following infusion. Serum Na decreased after one treatment; Na was increased with repeat treatment. In addition, urinary Ca, K and Na were consistently increased following repeat treatment. Serum K was consistently unchanged with repeat treatment. Renal Ca was consistently high during treatment and this response was consistently seen, during and after treatment. These results are consistent with the interpretation that L-tryptophan induced renal hypertrophy is an adaptive physiological response that is accompanied by enhanced renal Ca and K. This adaptation is maintained by a continual renal Ca-K ATPase activity.

During the Iraqi war, Europe and the United States supported and backed the Shi’ite resistance movement of Moqtada al-Sadr.

Pleconarixy as 'motive', not ideology': an analytical commentary, revisited, on the concept of 'plebiscitary legitimacy' in the Belgian Constitutional Court on 18 May.
The Constitutional Court of Belgium has repeatedly given support for the fundamental right to non-violent self-defense and the right to bear arms, but not for the concept of the non-violent or the right to resist. In fact, the concept of 'plebiscitary legitimacy', the expression used to justify this refusal of the right to resist has been criticized as an 'ideology' within the Belgian constitutional system. By a historical analysis the concept is not an ideology but a 'motive' that allows, through legal argument, for the denial of the rights to non-violent and peaceful self-defense and to own an arse. The Belgian Constitutional Court is the first court that has used the concept 'plebiscitary legitimacy' and the results of this analysis will encourage the jurisprudence of other jurisdictions in which there are conflicts between the constitutional system and the individual rights.

A few short blocks northeast lies Chinatown Plaza near Grand Avenue which offers small stalls in what, until recently, you could call the South-Asian Little India. This is where you’ll find the original Indian bakery, and the only one where you’ll find this sweet tooth indulgence: mango.

So where does one find mango in Bangkok? In restaurants the only answer would be in a side dish, like the Thai dish of curry or curried dishes like the curry mango. But in Thailand it’s more common to eat mango on its own, and that may make you realize that the mango is something even more than a sweet taste, and more akin to a fruit.

In Thai culture mangoes are considered an object of beauty and good luck. They are considered to have a high spiritual value and are considered to aid in gaining good luck and good fortune.

It seems like a strange thing to find a fruit described as a ‘heavenly fruit’, but I could not find a similar description in any of Thai language books on fruit.

[Analysis regarding genetic relationships by pars inter bestii: is Yapu more closely related to Drosophila than the rest of the Drosophila genus?].
Yapu is a recently identified species in the genus Drosophila (Drosophila yapuana) based on its phylogenetic position among the other Drosophila species. Yapu, although morphologically similar to other Drosophila species, has a unique chromosomal constitution. An evolutionary genealogy was constructed to analyse possible evolutionary features of the Yapu genome, based on the chromosomal constitution and the nucleotide sequence data. The phylogenetic tree, based on parsimony analysis of 16 chromosomes, shows a close relationship between Yapu and D. subobscura. An evolutionary history analysis of the nucleotide sequence of the Yapu genome indicates that the sequence divergence is higher between Yapu and D. subobscura than between Yapu and the other three Drosophila species. A high frequency of non-synonymous substitution suggests that the Yapu genome has been under a strong selective pressure and contains more gene sequences under positive selection than the rest of the Drosophila genus. The New Way Forward, And How Its Failure Proves Everything You Believe In [Infograph]

A large percentage of the population has been conditioned into thinking of the world in binary ways. As the world becomes more and more interconnected, we cannot help but think about it in these binary ways. However, this belief that we only exist in two extremes is only limiting if we ignore the fact that reality exists on a spectrum. In the same way that we cannot see the entire spectrum of life in one spectrum, we cannot see the entire spectrum of existence in only two extremes.

The belief that we can only see, think and do what is on the bottom of an evolutionary spectrum is what is keeping us in the two extremes of the world – the top and the bottom. In fact, if we look at the world from the bottom up, the universe cannot only be two extremes. It is an infinite spectrum of life. Some things on the spectrum are better than others, but the world is never less than one, infinite spectrum of life. We cannot find a way to escape this reality because it has always existed.

Mumbai man accused killing two children of Nargu in a freak driving incident in Mahalaxmi

Mumbai: A 34-year-old man is on an indefinite bail till October 17 for allegedly killing two children of Nargu resident at the Mahalaxmi locality in the Peddarwada district on August 18.

The accused, Ashwath Kumar, was arrested from the Nargu area on September 2. During interrogation he admitted to killing the two children, aged 5 and 3, in a freak driving incident on the night of August 18.

Kumar works as an auto mechanic at a local body, and had been staying in Nargu since three months, police said. It’s unclear why he killed his two family members.

The accused is accused of killing the children at a point where they were returning home after going to a school, police said.

Kushal K. Sharma, Additional Commissioner of Police, said, “It is a very heinous act on their family members. We are probing the case while registering a murder case.”

A case has been registered under sections 302 (murder) of IPC, 324 (voluntarily causing hurt)

This project seeks a better fundamental image that enables understanding to better utilize stem cell transplant approaches to overcome a host of human diseases, including type 1 diabetes. Stem cell transplant approaches rely on transplanted cells to heal tissue damage, but the cell numbers are limited by severe host immune rejection. In particular in type 1 diabetes, pancreatic and islet stem cells fail to regenerate for over two years after cell transplantation. We have identified a novel signaling pathway called the interleukin-13/STAT3 pathway that regulates the survival of islet stem cells. Because stem cells are intrinsically immunologically privileged, this signaling pathway is critical for their survival. However, how this pathway is regulated is not well understood. This proposal builds on preliminary data and will elucidate mechanisms that regulate the survival of islet stem cells using a genetic approach. Specifically, we will (i) identify key genes and protein components of this pathway; (ii) determine the role of STAT3 in regulating the survival of islet stem cells, and (iii) determine the role of this pathway in type 1 diabetes using an experimental animal model. The proposed genetic experiments are innovative because they directly test the role of this novel immunologically privileged signaling pathway in regulating the survival of islet stem cells. Fatal familial reticulate and amelia porportitus are inherited disorders similar to each other yet distinct from other known Mendelian retinal disorders. The inherited retinal disorder in this report represents the first published human inherited retinal disease to appear associated with the Xq27 locus on chromosome X, a location shared by 2 other retinal disorders. The causative mutation appears to be a novel splice mutation in the fms/myostatin (MSTN) gene. This is the first gene mutation known to underlie a retinal disorder. Inherited retinal conditions appear to be due, at least in part, to gene mutations. The discovery of Xq27 as an important locus for Mendelian retinal degeneration supports the paradigm of a pleiotropic gene in retinal degeneration.

Predict factors are identified affecting mortality-based treatment protocols of gastrosteatose hypertrasplasia patients in Japan.
Traditionally, gastrosteatosis is considered as a risk factor for gastric cancer. However, recent advances in the diagnosis and treatment of gastrosteatosis have made various types of gastrosteatosis be recognized as malignancies. Although gastrosteatosis is closely related to carcinogenesis, appropriate treatment for the disease remains a matter of debate. Thus, we aimed to clarify the appropriate treatment protocol for gastrosteatosis. Gastrosteatosis patients were treated with gastrectomy alone or with pyloroplasty, regardless of their age, gender, and preoperative disease state. We investigated the factors affecting overall and disease-specific survival after gastrectomy using univariate and multivariate analysis. Among 807 gastrosteatosis patients, the overall mortality rate was 16.2% (n=132). The 5-year overall survival was 83.0% after gastrectomy. A Better Version 0: Using a library‽A closer read into our software‽Code sharing: Open source‽New features‽Version 0.3.0‽

A Better Version 0.2: Releasing early, before changes were integrated

This new version is a great step up from previous versions, where we didn’t release a new version until after everything was integrated and ready. If it’s ready, then we release. And if it’s not, there’s always next.

Version 0.3.0 was a hard cut, where we had to remove features we didn’t like and keep some of the better ones. We cut the features to a small set, and I was able to re-test a handful and make tweaks to reduce friction for the end users.

The version with the most tests went into the version 0.3.03. It wasn’t perfect, but it was a lot better than 0.2, at least in terms of test coverage. It should be even better now that there are several more tests in place (it also did have some changes that have been in tests since 0.2).

Qeshme, Gilen - Yoslim al-Wadiqash: a Palestinian city with a Palestinian identity

Qeshme is located in the central West Bank. A village with a Palestinian identity, its architecture is in stark contrast to the surrounding settlements which lack this feature.

The town has been under Israeli military occupation since 1967 and was incorporated to the West Bank as part of the Israeli military occupation zone, although it is still governed by the Israeli military authority.

Since 2006 Qishme has been governed by the Yasser Arafat administration (IA) in the Palestinian Authority. However, Arafat has repeatedly tried to get out of the local area, and the Israeli authorities have refused to recognize Palestinian authority over Qishme.

An old Qishme building is found near Qahwah camp, built in the traditional style of the area. In Qeshme, there is the Al Yosli Mosque, the first mosque built in Israel after 1948.

The Al Yosli Mosque is the first mosque built in Israel after 1948.

<|endoftext|>Q:

Probability of winning an armo game

I have an armo poker game with 8 players. 4 of them play against each other. Then another 4 players face against 3 other opponents. Finally, the winner chooses from the remaining two and gets the prize money. 
I am interested in analyzing the probability that the 8 players win or lose. I am new to poker so I am unsure of the way to start with the problem statement. I know that this problem has something to do with "conditional probabilities" but I could not find it. 
Thanks!

A:

Given the structure of the game and the two players who played against each other, the four players against each other are independents, and each one of them has the following possible outcome: Win; lose; draw; lose; draw; win. Each participant is assigned a different set of three payouts from the remaining pair.
So, the probability that any of these outcomes occurs for any participant in each of these trials is the product of probabilities for the outcomes for each of the participants.
Hence we have:  

$C.P( Win = \text{ Win }) = \dfrac{1}{4}

"Nothing" in English means nothing at all.

"I believe every single word in the Bible" would most certainly mean you believe the whole thing, even the crazy ones. "I believe everything." would mean I believe everything the Bible says, with one exception. It's not the case because what the Bible says is not the whole truth. There were other, older books that were written before the Bible, and it's possible these may contain a truth or two the Bible does not.
I believe the Bible includes all these contradictions, but it's only when I read that all the stories it is telling are true and I believe them all (I have done this to you over and over.) that I feel certain of its truth.

<|endoftext|>Q:

How to get the max value in a column

Let's say I have a table with the following fields (id number, quantity product_number price):
+----+-------+----------+
| id | quantity|      price|
+----+-------+----------+
|  1 |      1 |        21 |
+----+-------+----------+
|  1 |      2 |        22 |
+----+-------+----------+
|  1 |      3 |        23 |
+----+-------+----------+
|  1 |      4 |        24 |
+----+-------+----------+

How do I get the most expensive item?
For example, if there are 5 items, I would want the most expensive to be 22
Is this possible in mysql?
Thank you.

A:

SELECT id, MAX(quantity) AS max_quantity, price
FROM yourTable
GROUP BY id, price

Both folate and vitamin B12 levels significantly (p less than 0.05) decreased from the time of first spontaneous abortion or RPL to the time of repeat pregnancy failure. Pancreatic adenocarcinoma and breast cancer cell lines were assayed for mucin-associated Le(y)-specific markers. <|endoftext|>1. Field of the Invention
This invention relates to polyisobutylene of the isotactic series, and to a process of preparation by isomerization of such polyisobutylene, in particular at elevated temperatures. More particularly, this invention relates to a polyisobutylene of the isotactic series and to a process of making such a polyisobutylene.
2. Discussion of the Background
Isotactic polypropylene can be prepared by polymerizing propylene at elevated temperature in the presence of a Ziegler-type catalyst, as described, inter alia, in U.S. Pat. Cranbrook School

This landmark, picturesque historic building at the heart of South Surrey’s thriving shopping and employment district has been restored to its former glory and is now a lively arts and cultural centre that welcomes families with its open and accessible facilities. It has been a school for more than 100 years and provides an excellent education for children of a wide catchment area and has a capacity of 1,650 pupils.

As part of the school’s exciting development programme this building has been completely restored to its original Victorian form, creating a whole new state of the art theatre for children aged 3-6 and their families. The building is a short walk from The Square shopping centre and a 15 minute walk to The Waterfall trail and 20 minutes to The Waterfall. It is also served by bus routes and has excellent transport links with the local town.

The theatre has been extended to allow more space and it is now a flexible studio theatre ideal for school performances, local arts, family audiences and community events. The theatre is also available for hire for smaller productions, conferences, small plays or short concerts.

<|endoftext|>The Supreme Court of Canada will decide how far Ottawa can dictate where people can live in the country.

Last month, the top court heard arguments in a case involving a Canadian man who claimed the federal government, when he and his children were living in British Columbia, was not honouring its treaty obligation to Canadians living on and near Indian Reserves.

Rocco Barile, who lives in Saskatchewan on a reserve owned by the Government of Canada, is seeking $200,000 under the Canadian Human Rights Act because Ottawa had prevented him and his family's application to be able to live on his reserve in Saskatchewan.

Saskatchewan had argued its agreement with Ottawa was for the benefit of all Canadians, including the indigenous people on their reserve, and that it was unreasonable to limit the use of its land to the reserve's settlers.

But the Federal Court of Appeal said the government was not liable for Rocco Barile's rights under the act, and dismissed the case. The court said the federal government had a sovereign right to set boundaries for Indian reserve land – and, in Saskatchewan, its agreements with Ottawa did not limit that right.<|endoftext|>

How to get a value from a string in a hash in Ruby

I have a code that does the following:
def foo
    puts "What is the value of my bar hash #{bar[:baz]} ?"
end

I would like to know how to get this value in my file foo.rb 
#!/usr/bin/ruby
require 'ruby/core'

bar = { :baz => "fooo"} # this hash is a string not an array

end

The output I am getting is this:
What is the value of my bar hash "foo ?"

A:

Using the method to_proc? in Ruby 1.9.x. Or using the String#== operator in Ruby 1.8.x.
bar = { :baz => to_proc?("fooo") } 
puts bar[:baz]  # => "fooo"

<|endoftext|>Molecular analysis of hepatitis C virus variants circulating in Saudi Arabia.
The identification of viral variants in a limited geographic area with limited population sample size requires extensive sequence data to determine polymorphisms at the nucleotide level. In this report, partial coding regions of four serum samples from Saudi Arabia harboring different strains of hepatitis C virus (HCV) were sequenced to analyze for genetic heterogeneity. The HCV isolates were found to carry identical deletions in E1 and NS3 regions whereas the sequences at the NS5B region varied from those obtained previously. This finding of deletion/addition at the NS5B coding regions and in the E1 and NS3 regions strongly suggests that HCV quasispecies are involved in infection at varying degrees in this region of the world.<|endoftext|>

<|endoftext|>Surgical and medical intervention for the treatment of chronic pancreatitis.
Chronic pancreatitis (CP) is one of the most common debilitating diseases, seen in 4 percent of the population, and can lead to pancreatic cancer. Surgical management of CP is generally less successful compared with medical intervention, with the mortality rate for surgery ranging from 2.7% to 15%. A large variety of surgical and medical interventions have been used, based on the underlying pathophysiology and clinical presentation of disease, and including resection (cystic duct occlusion, Roux-en-Y choledochojejunal bypass, or endoscopic pancreatic sphincterotomy), endoscopic therapy (endoscopic papillary balloon dilation, endoscopic transmural drainage), and external beam radiation therapy. The available treatment options include surgical therapy and medical therapy, of which pancreatic endoscopic retrograde cholangio-pancreaticography and endoscopic therapy are important, although these are still considered investigational therapies. Both medical therapy and surgery provide similar benefit, whereas combination therapy can provide benefits that are superior to monotherapy. <|endoftext|>The most common form of cancer in women, and more common than breast, prostate, and lung cancers, is endometrial cancer. It is one of the most preventable diseases but most patients with endometrial cancer present at stages I and II. The current standard of care for treatment is external radiation followed by chemotherapy, or by laparotomy or surgery. Although there are many chemotherapeutic agents, these drugs are not completely effective. Some of the factors that have limited their success as chemotherapy includes: poor drug-target interactions resulting in side effects; tumor heterogeneity; inadequate drug penetration into tumor via blood or lymphatic vessels; poor delivery to tumor via non-tumor cells (e.g., normal or non-cancerous tissue in the body); and resistance to the drug, typically by the tumor itself.
To overcome certain of these problems, a number of approaches to therapy have been explored, all of which aim to deliver drug directly to the cancer cells: drug entrapped in nanoparticulate systems; drug encapsulated in liposomes; drug coated onto nanoparticles; and combination of drug-loaded nanoparticles with other pharmacological agents. In his early career he was a fashion buyer at Gaultier, but has always been an entrepreneur. Until May 2013 he was the chief executive officer of H&M, the clothing company he created out of the old KLM Royal Dutch Airlines that merged with the Dutch fashion brand. In 2017, he joined Gap as chief cultural officer.

Early life and education 
Olivier Charles Cachin was born on 2 June 1978 in Mons. He was the eldest of five children and spent his early life in a large family living in Saint-Pol-sur-Mer in Brittany. From the age of 6 to 15 he attended school in Paris where he continued to complete his high school exams. At age 15 he chose to leave France with a study in fashion design in London, where he finished his education.  Then he moved to Paris to do a one-year course in fashion merchandising at the Institut de la Mode et du Textiles. He graduated from the  Institut

<|endoftext|>Q:

What do I do about a poor quality, out-of-date question with some up-votes

I found this question on SO.SE and, upon some review, it has received good answers and one upvote and three downvotes.  
The other question it links to has almost no upvotes. It apparently has one downvote.  
It is somewhat out-of-date and seems to be about an obscure and/or obscurely-defined concept as opposed to a modern programming language such as C# or Java, which is out of date but which is also not obscure.  The answers to this question are not the best, to be clear, and in some cases are clearly not correct but not "out-of-the-mainstream".  
I believe that people reading these answers aren't getting the point.  The point is that this question should be about a modern, widely-used, stable standard: C# or Java.  It is not about a niche and obscure thing such as the Baudot scheme for encoding digital communications -- in which a scheme doesn't have any relevance to today's world because today's world has already implemented the scheme, albeit with many layers of abstraction

<|endoftext|>Q:

Unable to connect to Amazon EC2 instance from Cloudfront on Amazon Redshift

I am unable to access my EC2 instance inside AWS using CloudFront. I created my instance in VPC using VPC with subnet, then created private subnet and assigned public Elastic IP.
I then created CloudFront distribution for that instance using my subnet and elastic IP from Amazon Redshift. It is working fine except for accessing inside of AWS EC2. I am unable to access my instance from anywhere.
Can anyone help me what might be wrong in above steps ?

A:

You have put both AWS S3 and EC2 instance inside AWS VPC. So it seems like they are in same zone and same security group.
What you need to do is add separate security group rule to allow traffic of only VPC outbound.

Once you've added this in you can view how is your traffic coming to EC2 inside VPC. Right click on the source and look at IP address and all incoming traffic.

This paper reports a literature review of papers and conference papers on the history of the Hong Kong Society of Midwives which focused on issues of the history, development and the structure of educational programmes for young midwives. Historical documents on the history of nursing in Hong Kong since the 1920s reveal that the development of midwifery education is a unique phenomenon of Hong Kong in the twentieth century. <|endoftext|>Mental health of children born to women who receive prenatal vitamins.
This study represents two years of prospective studies concerning the mental health of 544 children born at a mean of 20.4 weeks' gestation to women who received either folic acid (n = 273) or placebo (n = 259) before or during their pregnancy. The mean Mental Developmental Index of the children born to women who were not on folic acid or placebo was higher than that of children born to women who were on folic acid (54.2) or placebo (51.7). The mean cognitive score of the children of all three groups was lower than expected. The lowest index score for a mental development index greater than or equal to 50 was in children of women who were both not on folic acid or placebo (47.7); the mental development index for the children of women who received folic acid (42.2) or placebo (42.6) was higher than the scores for all other groups. Children born to mothers who receive folic acid have a relatively higher Mental Developmental Index than their non-folic acid-treated counterparts.<|endoftext|>

<|endoftext|>Q:

How to implement thread safe concurrent programming with NodeJS

I know there are many question and answers about thread safe concurrency and how to add "Lock or Monitor" in multithreaded applications, however I couldn't find any relevant answer here that addresses the issue. In other words: How may I implement a "Lock" in NodeJS? 
Is it possible to have a variable declared as "private" then be added to a List or the like using a function? Or should I go a complete other route?

A:

The function will lock on itself, which will make it thread safe. If you have several functions using lock at the same time, there will be deadlock: the first to complete won't be able to proceed. So it is better on the first call to lock.
Locks are cheap because they only lock on itself. Using monitors/locks on a global require a bit more code and is more expensive.

<|endoftext|>Q:

How do I use the same input name and output name in a batch file in Windows?

How do I use the same input name and output name in a batch file in Windows? If I type the same name twice I get an "invalid variable name" error.

A:

You can't. 

Batch programs aren't usually run by passing "names" to them, but by invoking those programs or functions directly, in a syntax similar to the one you have in your example command: 
"C:\Program Files\MyProgram\myprogram.exe" "C:\temp"

However, you can save them to variables, and access their contents with their names in a more generic manner, i.e.
@ECHO OFF
SET "name=C:\Program Files\MyProgram\myprogram.exe"
ECHO %~1
ECHO %~2
ECHO %~4
ECHO %~6
ECHO %~8

Note that in this case you can't also use a spaces, because %-signs have their own special meaning to the interpreter. (See also this question:

<|endoftext|>Q:

What are the different levels of "Bard of Shadows"?

What are the different levels of the Bard of Shadows? 
What actions grant +1 Bard of Shadows to the Bard, compared to the 5th level cleric, for example?

A:

Bards of Shadows, in its simplest form, is a level of the bard class that can be gained through specific feats. 
Each bard gains a bonus to their ability checks that corresponds to their bard level; the maximum bonus they can get between two bard levels is +16.
There are only four such bard feats, and a fifth is not yet included in the Player's Handbook; all are discussed here and here.

The +16 bard bonus is awarded only for a bard's first two bard levels, because bards are bards only until level 5.
The Bard of Shadows is not a "bonus", it is a level. As such, the first two bard levels of a bard are only half-bonuses.
The bard is not allowed to gain extra bard levels, because no such thing exists.

<|endoftext|>The present invention relates to the field of computer systems, and particularly to methods for identifying and correcting memory errors in computer systems.
In computer systems (e.g. a mainframe host computer, a large mainframe client, a small workstation, a small personal workstation and a personal workprocessor), memory errors are well-documented problems that occur with a frequency of about 20 per thousand memory accesses. One problem (termed xe2x80x9ccritical timingxe2x80x9d) that results from such memory errors is that a computer program which reads or updates data from memory frequently loses track of where particular data has been and incorrectly assumes that the next data read or written by that program will be at the next memory index point. That is, a critical timing error is one in which a program has written or updated data in memory (e.g. in an associative computer system, each memory address has a unique address in the address space of the computer) which by a later write operation has been read (in particular from a cache) at an address which is incorrect (i.e., the address of the new data or program). This problem is well-known in computer systems and is well-documented through several references

<|endoftext|>Q:

Why is the following code returning a different number?

The following code is supposed to return the total number of days in the month of June and the total number of hours in the week of June:
#include<stdio.out

int main()
{
int days,hours; //declare int variables
scanf("%d",&days);
scanf("%d",&hours);
days=days*24+hours;  
days=days/7+days/30;  //calculate the number of days in the month of June
printf("%d",days);
return(0);
}

1
2
1
3
1
3

A:

You are dividing by 7, not by 30 as the % operator expects.
You should use % 30 to get 30.

<|endoftext|>1. Field of the Invention
This invention is related to the field of computer systems and, in particular, to a computer system and method for managing power states.
2. Description of Related Art
A computer system typically includes many components such as, for example, a central processing unit (CPU), input/output (I/O) devices and memory. The CPU is responsible for executing instructions to perform the functions of a computer system. The I/O devices are responsible for interfacing with the outside world (e.g., a peripheral device such as disk drives, tape drives, etc., and a keyboard, mouse and printer). The memory provides temporary storage for programs and data and is typically implemented using a dynamic random access memory (DRAM).

A:

In this case, "I have to" is a subjuncion of to go (the bank).
In general, "to go" means to go somewhere (or to get somewhere). In other words, you are going somewhere or going to somewhere (in this case the bank).
So, the sentence should be: (the bank).

I have to go to the bank to cash my check.

This would be the normal sentence for the above situation.
"A" would be used in a situation that has to with an object, and "an" could be a pronoun (like "it's").

I have to go to the bank to the post office to cash my checks.
  I have to go to the library to get my library card.

The "it's" could also be a "to" in this case (like "go" is a "to" in this situation).

program on a PC and use it to talk to the Pi.

I have a Pi and I have a serial console.

The Pi also has a web server (Apache), but that is a bit of an overkill for
what you can get from an RPi. You could also use it as a simple webserver and
run your own web app on it, but it is more than a web server.

I would recommend using an RPi as a web server. I don't see the need for a
serial server (and I'm not sure it's even necessary), and the RPi has a
decent enough web server to be able to serve web pages.

What is the best way to get the most accurate data from Google Analytics?

My site is currently using Google Analytics. I would like to know how I get the most accurate data possible for a particular campaign.

A:

The most accurate data is the number of users that have visited a particular webpage (or page) within a given time period. This is what you get with the standard report, which you can access at http://www.google.com/analytics/web/home

If you want to find out the most accurate information about the number of visitors for a particular page, try the custom reports.  
For example:

Custom reports:

You can use the report to see the average time it takes for each user to complete each task on your site.
You could even use a report to see the number of visitors for a particular URL, or to see what percentage of users have a given IP address.

The best way to get accurate data for a specific campaign (or group of users) would be to use a custom report, which you can access by clicking Custom Reports from the Analytics menu in the upper left.

<|endoftext|>The role of the microvasculature in the control of tissue growth and repair.
This review describes the role of the microvasculature during tissue repair and growth. The vascular system is the largest system in the body with an enormous capacity for growth and repair. This is due to the presence of numerous blood and lymph capillaries that can grow into and around the wound site, providing nutrients to both growing cells and the cells in the surrounding tissue that are attempting to repair themselves. The microvascilular network is also the largest source of blood flow, with a capacity of up to 1 mm3 per hour. This means that the microvascular system is the most active and dynamic system in the body. It has been suggested that the vascular endothelium, which is the major source of vasoactive substances, is the main determinant of tissue growth and repair. The microvascular endothelium is capable of responding to changes in the tissue environment and the microenvironmental conditions that surround the endothelium determine the response. In addition, the endothelium has the capacity to respond to a range of growth stimuli, including angiogenetic growth factors, such as basic fibrous non-collagen proteins and platelet-derived growth factors.

<|endoftext|>Q:

What does it mean for a sequence to be "increasing in the first place"?

What does it mean to say that a sequence is increasing? Is it true that if $a_1 < a_2 < ... $ is a sequence then $a_2 < a_3 < ... $ also is a sequence, and is increasing?

A:

Yes, that is true.
Suppose that $a_1$ is the largest number in the sequence. Then, if $a_2 >a_1$, then $a_3 > a_1$. But then $a^2_3 >a^2_1$ and the sequence is increasing.
If, instead, $a_2 =a_1$, then $a_1$ is the largest number in the sequence, so $a_1 < a_1$, a sequence is decreasing.

<|endoftext|>Q:

Can I get my hands on some code that is being developed by a friend?

I'm a software developer and we have a friend who's a web developer. 
They are working on a web-app and I would like to have a peek at their code. Is this something that I could ask them or is there a way to get the code?

A:"Sure"
I:"I can't ask my friend but I'll send you his email address."
They: "Cool"

A:

You can ask him. But he will probably say "I don't want to give you any details of our code, and you can't see it anyway".
You could ask him to give you a copy. But that's probably not what you want either - you want the source, not just its binary.
I'm not saying you can't ask for code (I've never done that before, but I've heard it's not a bad approach), but it's not a bad idea to ask for the source code of the project in general.
I would not expect a developer not to want to share their code. But I would expect them to be very cautious about sharing it.

The renin angiotensine system (RAS) is a system of hormonal control that plays an important role in the pathogenesis of essential hypertension. The RAS is a cascade that begins with the conversion of angiotensina I to angiotensin II by the enzyme renin and ends with the formation and release of the vasoconstrictor peptide aldosterone. The effects of angiotenstensin are mediated primarily through the type-1 angiotensin-converting-enzyme (ACE) which converts angiotensin I to angiotensins II and III, and the type 1 angiotensin (AT) receptor which is a seven transmembrane-domain G-protein coupled receptor which mediating a variety of effects including vasoconstriction, sodium retention, and renal sodium retention. This invention relates generally to the field of semiconductor processing and, more specifically, to the field of forming shallow trench isolation structures.
2. State of the Art
Shallow trench isolation (STI), which is also referred to as local oxidation of silicon (LOCOS) or field oxide extension (FOX), provides isolation between active regions of a semiconductor substrate. In a STI process, field oxide is grown in a trench that is formed by etching into the semiconductor substrate. A dielectric layer, such as a nitride layer, is deposited on the semiconductor substrate and patterned to form trenches. Then, a layer of photoresist is patterned on the layer of nitride. The patterned photoresist layer is used as an etch-stop layer to stop the etching of the nitride layer. The nitride layer, the photoresist layer, and the semiconductor substrate are then etched through the patterned layers of photovresist.
The trenches in the layer of nitride are etched down to approximately a predetermined depth, and then the nitride layer is removed. The trenches are then filled with an insulative material, such as a layer made of silicon dioxide (
