The man, who was arrested on Sunday afternoon, was charged with attempted burglary in connection with the incident at a home in the 100000 block of East Custer Road.

The victim, who was at home when the incident occurred, said she and the alleged burglar were in a heated argument when they began yelling at each other, according to court records.

The woman said she had sold the house and was about to move to a new one, according to court documents.

The suspect, who is described as white and in his early 20-s, then allegedly grabbed her by the neck. She said he then pushed her down onto the couch and told her not to scream or he would call the police, court records say.

The woman then ran outside and flagged down her husband, who was in a car, according records.

The husband then called police and an arrest report was filed at about 1:30 p.m.

Police found that the woman’s home had been burglarized and the man was arrested on Sunday afternoon, records say.

<|endoftext|>The invention pertained to methods for preparing polyimidocarbonimide polymers and polyamide polyimids.
Polyamide resor high temperature performance polymeric films are useful because, when used to protect against heat, such polymers exhibit good mechanical strength properties. However, when these resins are employed in a protective coating, their heat deflection and impact values decrease. The polyimido resins are useful because their impact properties remain substantially unreductioned. However these resinous materials are difficult to prepare.
It would appear, therefore it be desirable that polyamide-imido polymer materials have the same properties of heat deflections and the polyimido materials should also exhibit impact resistance in addition thereto, but in a much simpler and cheaper process. The invention has been accomplished to this goal in accordance hereof, as well. <|endoftext|>A new approach for assessing aphasia. I-A study of phonological processing in the ailing. The case of a right-handed a left-brain damaged a left brain injured man who suffered a stroke. The case was investigated using an adapted version of the Stroop color and naming test, and an adapted Stroop test of naming of the colors red and white in a color-blind patient who is also color-deficient in the red. In both tests the ailing had difficulty with phonology. However, when the ails was compared with the colorblind patient on the Stroope of red, he had no difficulty and performed at his previous level. The phonological deficit is therefore probably a result from a damage in a different brain area, probably in language processing. In the Stroop naming of color he did perform normally on both the tests. The ails was compared also against the colorblind patients, and he showed more difficulty on color and naming in both tests than the other ailed, but this is not likely the explanation for their ails, as they both have similar problems on color, while they have very little trouble with color naming and the Stroope, in which color-names is not an important problem to them as they are.

The web design industry as an ecosystem is in an interesting transition period right before the endgame of the web. The web itself has become so powerful and influential it is now being considered as one component in our everyday digital lives. The way that websites interact is becoming an ever-more integral aspect in people's online and offline interactions. This has been driven by the increasing ubiquancy, accessibility (both in and of themselves), speed, ubiquity of content creation and sharing tools, and a variety and abundance in the number of websites and web-pages. In short: people are increasingly relying less on search engines for all of their digital information needs, but increasingly using search results, and more importantly their personal web experience. In the same breath people also are more reliant and interested to have a personal web experience, where content and content-related services, tools and information is more personalised, and where people's personal interests and needs is being cued.

<|endoftext|>A novel method for measuring and analyzing the quality characteristics of optical fiber transmission system components is needed, especially in view the ever more severe environment of space.
Optical components used as part components in the system for carrying light from a source through optical components and to the end-use system can fail due either mechanical or thermal stresses. For optical fiber systems, the failure can result when the system component breaks due, either directly by a fracture caused at its weakest points by thermal and mechanical loading during its use as part, for instance a connector in an optic cable; or, it is the system's failure as an entire component. For the latter failure to be of a catastrophic character the failure mode has to be initiated during the use of a particular system part, and not due merely by its installation or subsequent operation in use as a part component. For instance if, after installation as part component, it becomes a thermal and mechanical load and is subsequently operated to cause failure. In such event a catastrophic event can occur. For instance in an optic cable a connector can become fractured by a fracture in the fiber cable caused, for instance when pulling the cable from the reel. This is not the type failure mode of interest. Rather a more gradual and insidious mode, which can take months of

<|endoftext|>A comparison of aqueously-dried-cottonseed-stalk and dried cottonseal as an absorbency material for paper products: A review on its properties.
In this study paper-based absorbable films were prepared and tested in a comparative study to evaluate properties of two commonly-known materials for absorbability in aqueic media: a commercially available absorbency agent (ABA), and cotton-cord and dry cotton. In general, ABA is a water soluble material which can be added as powder or liquid, and is commonly available as absorbency additives. Cottonseals and cots were also tested in the study, but were found to be inferior materials for use as absorbable films compared with a commercially prepared absorbency-adding agent. Cotton-stalk and cotton were also studied in terms of absorbent and deinking characteristics. The results show cotton-cotton and cotton are superior to cotton-stalke and dry cotton in absorbable properties, as they provide a higher percentage of dry strength and a higher dry bulk.<|endoftext|>1. We propose the application, development of and use in our laboratory, of a novel technique for the study the cell death processes. We are applying our recently discovered and developed technology, which is capable of visual detection and analysis by a single optical path and by one detector, of the morphometric parameters and biochemical events occurring during a process, such the death process. This technique, called optical coimmunosorblng (OXSCAN). It allows simultaneous analysis by one optical path of morphologic, cytologic, morphometric or immunocytometric changes in one cell population. This technology has already been tested in our own research and we propose its use and further developments as an important and innovative tool for cell biologists. The role of other, less recognised, but probably more potent and significant, environmental and occupational exposures remains uncertain but should be considered as an integral component in the assessment. The most likely exposures in a modern workplace include the effects, if there are them to a greater, than in past industrialised society; (a.) of the workplace itself, such, e. g, the noise levels; of the work environment; e., the use of pesticides in agriculture and forestry and, in general; of industrial and commercial products; the effects (a., a.-c) from industrial chemicals in general, and the effects from some occupational exposures; e., the effect of occupational chemicals, and their interactions, e.. g; the role of solanines; and (e.) the effect, e. , of some industrial and environmental exposures.

<|endoftext|>A new study suggests the use the internet to find and buy sex could be a major contributor of rising sexual violence against men. The researchers, led at Harvard University and the New England Center for Organizational Excellence, analyzed data collected in the UK between 2006 and 2009 and the USA between 2007 through 2009 to examine whether men's online activity could explain why there was such a large rise, or ’tectonics, ”of male victim-perception-of sexual violence in Britain in 2006 and 2008 compared with the UK's ’pre-Internet” levels from 2001. Their analysis suggests that while the increase is statistically insignificant, online activities are linked with an increasing perception-by men that men in their community are being subjected to increasing amounts, and at a younger ages, sexual aggression by men against other men in the community. The research also indicates men who are online and who report being sexually attacked by other men online have more negative feelings and perceptions toward women, including a greater belief in gender roles that men and women are interchangeable in sexual relationships than their offline counterparts.

To study the feasibility of using a combination of autologous bone marrow and bone marrow aspirate in the treatment of chronic osteomyelitis, we developed an experimental animal model. We used a combination of bone marrow from the femoral head of a rabbit and autologous bone marrow. We performed a bone marrow aspiration of the affected bone and then injected the aspirated bone marrow into the femur of a rabbit. The aspirated bone marrow was collected and injected into the femur of a rabbit, which was treated with a combination of the aspiration and the injected bone marrow. In the control group, the rabbit bone marrow was injected into the femur and then the femoral bone marrow was aspirated. <|endoftext|>Q:

Is there an easier way to do this?
I'm trying to get a list of all the users who are in the database and are also in the database. So far I have this:
SELECT DISTINCT(user_id)
FROM users
WHERE username = "test" 
AND user = 1

I'm trying to get all users that are not in the database and not in the users database. 

A:

You can use the NOT EXISTS function to get the opposite of an IN clause.
SELECT DISTINCT(user_id)
FROM users
WHERE username = "test" NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT user_id
 FROM users
    WHERE user = 1
)
;

Aerobic exercise increases the muscle cross-sectional area (CSA) and capillary density (CD) of the quadriceps femoris (QF) muscle. This study investigated whether a single bout of high intensity resistance training would increase CSA and CD of the QF muscle of healthy subjects. Twelve healthy male subjects (age: 24.6 +/- 2.1 years, body mass index: 25.1 +/- 2.1 kg/m(2)) completed a 4-week training program (two sets of 8-12 repetitions of the leg press at 80% of 1 repetition maximum). The CSA and CD of the QF muscle of all the subjects were determined by magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) before, immediately after and at 24 h and 48 h after the training program. The CSA and CD of the right and left QF muscles of each individual before and after the training program were not significantly different (p > 0.05) and were not significantly different between the right and left sides (p > 0.05). <|endoftext|>A novel method of determining the effect of a treatment on the rate of cell proliferation in a tissue culture using the cell cycle analysis method is described. The cell cycle analysis method is a method that uses a flow cytometry and the cell division cycle of a cell is analyzed in terms of its phase. The method can analyze the cell proliferation rate and can be used for a quantitative analysis.

The method can be used to determine the effect of a treatment on the growth rate of a tissue culture using a tissue culture and the method is described as below. A tissue culture is divided and cultured. A sample of the tissue culture is taken at the beginning of the cell growth period and the cell division cycle of the tissue culture is analyzed. Then, the tissue culture is divided into two portions and cultured. A sample of the tissue culture is taken at the end of the cell growth period. Then, the cell division cycle of the tissue culture is analyzed. The difference between cell division cycles is calculated and is used as the growth rate of a tissue culture.

What's the difference?

I have seen both the following:

"I am a student, and I have to work on a thesis" (I am) 
  "I am a student, and have to work on a thesis"

What is the difference?
Is it the same thing?

A:

"I am a student, and I have to work on a thesis" is not correct.  "I am a student, and have to work on a thesis" is correct because you are using a possessively possessive phrase.  The possessive phrase is the subject of the sentence, not the verb.  The possessive phrase is "I have to work on a thesis", which is the object of the sentence.
In other words, "Have to" is the object and "Work on" is the subject.  The object has to be a noun, not a pronoun.  The object of a sentence is always a verb phrase.  In other words, "have to" is the object of the sentence.  
You should never use "I have to" to begin a sentence.

"If I were a man, I wouldn't do this"

A:

This is a very common way of expressing an opinion.
If a person said:

I am a woman, I wouldn't do this.

then they would be making a factual statement.  If they were making this statement about their gender then that would be a gender statement.
But in this case, they aren't making a factual statement but instead they have a gender opinion.

So the sentence could also be expressed like

If a man would do this, then a woman would not do that.

A:

The constructor is an instance of that member function.

Solutions are a method to solve a particular problem, and the solution is a method to find that solution.

<|endoftext|>Q:

How to use a class in a method?

This is the code:
public class Main {
     public static void main(String[] args) {
       new Main().run();
     }
}

class Main{
   public Main() {
         new Main().run(); //error: no suitable method for call

 }
}

A:

You can not call a method of a different type. You can only invoke a method of the same type:
class Main {
   public static void main(String[] args) {
     new Main().run(); // error: no suitable method for call  
}

public class Main {
   public static void main(String... args) 
   public static void run() {
        new Main().run();
   }
}
